MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kimberly Williams of Brayton Purcell, 898-1555, appearing for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MARY REYNOLDS' Motion For Order To Realign Defendant-Heirs Glenn Fite, Cecil Fite, Sylvia Colene and Randel Fite as plaintiffs is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
